title:
NZGOAL guidance notes
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## NZGOAL guidance notes
A series of guidance notes providing practical guidance on applying NZGOAL, covering website copyright statement, file formats, procuring copyright works, and databases and datasets.
NZGOAL guidance note 1: Website copyright statements
NZGOAL guidance note 2: File formats, updated August 2015
NZGOAL guidance note 3: Procuring copyright works, updated January 2015
Guidance note 4: Databases and datasets
Guidance note 5: Comparison of Creative Commons 3.0 New Zealand and 4.0 International licences
Guidance note 6: Licensing and use of images containing identifiable individuals or protected property
Guidance note 7: Obtaining licensing rights when creating databases that may be open-licensed
